docket_entries.description: CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. PL. PRESENT W/CHARLES T RAMSEY AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT W/LUZ BUITRAGO AS COUNSEL. BY 8-31-93 - $180 ATTY FEES & COSTS TO BE PD. AT $60 MO STARTING 9-15-93 - DEF. MUST PAY RENT ON TIME - IF DEF. FAILS ON PMTS, PL.
